docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASTOR, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT SINGHASENI, MARK
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. THE COURT WILL MAKE ORDERS ON THIS REQUEST AFTER HEARING, WHICH WILL TAKE PLACE ON FEBRUARY 20, 2026 @1:30 P.M. IN DEPT 506. OTHER ORDERS: MR. SINGHASENI SHALL BRING VENMO RECORDS, BANK ACCOUNT STATEMENTS + PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT LOSS.

REMARK:REMARK:RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FORM THE POST OFFICE ON 11/12/25. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BY CERTIFIED MAIL, MAILED TO MARK SINGHASENI. RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD, RETURN TO SENDER.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PROGRESS REPORT FOR PAYMENT STATUS HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ALLOWING THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS GRANTED
SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SINGHASENI, MARK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY MARK SINGHASENI IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR BRIAN PASTOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARK SINGHASENI IS PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE JUDGEMENT DEBTOR IS TO MAKE $150 PAYMENTS DUE ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON MARCH 15TH 2026. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2026 TO REASSESS PAYMENTS, AND FOR THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PROVIDE FINANCIALS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASTOR, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT SINGHASENI, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2025 BY JUDGE JOSH M. FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF BRIAN PASTOR APPEARED. DEFENDANT MARK SINGHASENI APPEARED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOSH M. FREDRICKS, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY PASTOR, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT SINGHASENI, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-07-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARED. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. VISITING JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASTOR, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGHASENI, MARK $5,140.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,230.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY PASTOR, BRIAN SINGHASENI, MARK
